Class AsiDesktopAsiContainer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.AbstractAsiContainer
uno.anahata.asi.swing.AbstractSwingAsiContainer
uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing.AsiDesktopAsiContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class AsiDesktopAsiContainer extends AbstractSwingAsiContainer
A specialized AbstractAsiContainer for the standalone Swing application. It manages the lifecycle of sessions within a standalone UI environment.
Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • AsiDesktopAsiContainer

      public AsiDesktopAsiContainer()
      Constructs a new StandaloneAsiContainer with 'AsiDesktop' as hostApplicationId.

    • AsiDesktopAsiContainer

      public AsiDesktopAsiContainer(String hostApplicationId)
      Constructs a new AsiDesktopAsiContainer.
      Parameters:
      hostApplicationId - the unique identifier of the host application

  • Method Details

    • focusUI

      protected void focusUI(Agi agi)
      Environment-specific logic to visually focus or select the UI component associated with the given session.

      Implementation details: Delegates focus to the main UI panel to ensure the corresponding tab is selected.

      Specified by:
      focusUI in class AbstractSwingAsiContainer
      Parameters:
      agi - The session to focus.

    • closeUI

      protected void closeUI(Agi agi)
      Environment-specific logic to visually close or hide the UI component associated with the given session.

      Implementation details: Delegates tab removal to the main UI panel when a session is closed.

      Specified by:
      closeUI in class AbstractSwingAsiContainer
      Parameters:
      agi - The session to close.

    • getUI

      public AgiPanel getUI(Agi agi)
      Retrieves the platform-specific UI component associated with an Agi session.

      Implementation details: Lazily creates and caches the AgiPanel for the requested session.

      Specified by:
      getUI in class AbstractAsiContainer
      Parameters:
      agi - The session.
      Returns:
      The UI component (e.g., AgiPanel or AgiTopComponent).

    • createNewAgiConfig

      public AgiConfig createNewAgiConfig()
      Creates a new agi session blueprint. Overridden by concrete containers to provide product-specific configurations (e.g., NetBeansAgiConfig).

      Implementation details: Instantiates a desktop-specific configuration pre-registered with standard providers.

      Specified by:
      createNewAgiConfig in class AbstractAsiContainer
      Returns:
      The new agi configuration.
